summary: Tested Admin User 360 New Actions - All 15 backend tests passed, all frontend modals working. New actions tested: block_user, unblock_user, reset_pin (returns new_pin), change_role, change_referral (supports 'remove' keyword), add_prc, deduct_prc. Frontend AdminUser360New page at /admin/user360 fully functional with all admin action modals.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend admin_user360.py: All new actions implemented correctly - block_user/unblock_user (aliases for ban/unban), reset_pin (generates 6-digit PIN and returns it), change_role (validates user/sub_admin/admin), change_referral (supports 'remove' keyword and validates referrer exists)
Backend properly validates: invalid role returns 400, invalid referrer UID returns 404, self-reference returns 400, negative PRC amount returns 400
Frontend AdminUser360New.js: All 6 admin action buttons present with proper data-testid attributes
Frontend modals: Reset PIN, Change Role, Adjust Balance, Change Referral, Delete User - all open/close correctly with proper UI elements
Search functionality works for both UID and email
User profile card displays: name, UID, role, email, mobile, date, referral code, subscription plan, PRC balance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin User 360 New page fully tested at /admin/user360. All backend actions working: block_user, unblock_user, reset_pin, change_role, change_referral, add_prc, deduct_prc, delete_user. Frontend has AdminActionsPanel with 6 buttons: Block, Reset PIN, Change Role, Adjust Balance, Change Referral, Delete User. All modals open/close correctly. Search works by UID and email.

features_tested.full_view_endpoint: PASS - Returns user, stats, referral, transactions, redeem_requests
features_tested.change_referral_action: PASS - Sets new referrer or removes with 'remove' keyword
features_tested.frontend_search: PASS - Search input and button work
